title: Shared Views to Allow Saved Filters, Mirrored Columns, & Connected Boards
excerpt: I would like to embed a public calendar on our website that is a rollup of several calendars. Within Monday.com the #saved-filters, #connected-boards, and #mirror content work perfectly. However, when I go to embed it th…

posts.author: ACC.Web.Team (ACC Web Team)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to embed a public calendar on our website that is a rollup of several calendars. Within Monday.com the #saved-filters, #connected-boards, and #mirror content work perfectly. However, when I go to embed it the #saved-filters and #mirror content is removed. The tool is fantastic but would be better if we had embeddable and sharing option views using URL parameters.
